text:
15/11/2023

Dear Dr. Smith,

Re: Mr. John Doe, DOB 10/05/1961

I am writing to update you on Mr. Doe's oncological status. The patient was initially diagnosed with lung adenocarcinoma in January 2022. Molecular testing at diagnosis showed wild-type EGFR. He underwent a right upper lobectomy on February 10th, 2022. Adjuvant chemotherapy with cisplatin was initiated in March 2022.

Unfortunately, the disease progressed earlier this year. A brain MRI in May revealed a solitary metastatic lesion. He received stereotactic radiotherapy for the brain lesion last May.

Recently, Mr. Doe reported increasing lower back pain. A PET scan was performed yesterday to evaluate his recent back pain. The PET scan performed yesterday showed hypermetabolic lesions in the lumbar spine consistent with bone metastases. Today, his performance status is OMS 1.

We have discussed starting a new line of systemic therapy to control the bone disease.

Sincerely,

Oncology Team
